NEGLIGENCE ARE SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. PREVAILING PARTY PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2013 Continued To Aug-21-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-21-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. John C Elsbree of Law Offices of John C Elsbree (415-928-5100) appear for plaintiff Donald A. Fineout opposing party. / Atty. Caroline M. Nasella of Goldfarb & Lipman LLP (510-836-6336) for defendants Polk Senior Housing Asso. Polk Senior Housing LLC and Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corp. moving party.

Argued, the court adopted its tentative ruling, DEFENDANT POLK SENIOR HOUSING ASSOCIATES, L.P., POLK SENIOR HOUSING LLC and TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Demurrer to the first cause of action is not supported by Points and authorities; Duty is sufficiently alleged under Biakanja; prospective economic "lessor-lessee" relationship and independent wrongful act, i.e. negligence are sufficiently alleged. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-07-2013 Continued To Jun-21-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
